mapper.insert: insert into doc_version (docid, content, editor) values (#{docid}, #{content, jdbcType=BLOB}, #{editor})
insert into doc_version (docid, content, editor, snapshot_type, file_size) values (#{docid}, #{content, jdbcType=BLOB}, #{editor}, #{snapshotType}, #{fileSize})

insert into doc_version (vid, docid, content, editor, createtime, created_at, created_by, snapshot_type, labels, is_locked, diff_stats, file_size, parent_vid) values (#{vid}, #{docid}, #{content, jdbcType=BLOB}, #{editor}, #{createtime}, #{createdAt}, #{createdBy}, #{snapshotType}, #{labels, typeHandler=cchf.back.handler.JsonListTypeHandler}, #{isLocked}, #{diffStats, typeHandler=cchf.back.handler.DiffStatsTypeHandler}, #{fileSize}, #{parentVid})
mapper.select: select vid, docid, content, editor, createtime, created_at, created_by, snapshot_type, labels, is_locked, diff_stats, file_size, parent_vid from doc_version where docid = #{docid} order by createtime desc
select vid, docid, content, editor, createtime, created_at, created_by, snapshot_type, labels, is_locked, diff_stats, file_size, parent_vid from doc_version where vid = #{vid}

select vid, docid, content, editor, createtime, created_at, created_by, snapshot_type, labels, is_locked, diff_stats, file_size, parent_vid from doc_version where docid = #{docid} order by createtime desc limit 1

select vid, docid, content, editor, createtime, created_at, created_by, snapshot_type, labels, is_locked, diff_stats, file_size, parent_vid from doc_version where docid = #{docid} and createtime >= #{windowStart} and snapshot_type = 'auto_save' order by createtime desc limit 1

select vid, docid, content, editor, createtime, created_at, created_by, snapshot_type, labels, is_locked, diff_stats, file_size, parent_vid from doc_version where docid = #{docid} and createtime >= #{cutoffTime} and is_locked = false and snapshot_type != 'auto_milestone' order by createtime desc

select count(*) from doc_version where docid = #{docid}
and (editor like concat('%', #{search}, '%') or JSON_SEARCH(labels, 'one', concat('%', #{search}, '%')) is not null)
mapper.delete:
delete from doc_version where vid in
#{vid}
mapper.update: update doc_version set labels = #{labels} where vid = #{vid}
update doc_version set labels = #{labels, typeHandler=cchf.back.handler.JsonListTypeHandler} where vid = #{vid}
update doc_version set is_locked = #{isLocked} where vid = #{vid}
